description: Golden squat trace fixtures: minimal pass/fail contract for SquatMotionEvidenceEngineV2 (future).

fixtures.description: Real-device shallow down-up-return; V2 must yield usable lower-body flexion/extension motion evidence (pass).
Real-device deep down-up-return; V2 must yield usable motion evidence (pass).
PR5-FIX real-device failure class: shallow down-up-return formerly blocked by legacy no_reversal.
PR5-FIX real-device failure class: shallow down-up-return formerly blocked by legacy no_return_to_start.
PR5-FIX real-device failure class: shallow down-up-return formerly blocked by setup/not_armed legacy gates.
PR5-FIX real-device pass class: deep down-up-return remains V2-owned pass.
Standing / non-cycle trace; V2 must not mark usable evidence (fail).
Seated or bottom-hold without valid return; V2 must not mark usable evidence (fail).
PR5-FIX-2 guard: descent started but no reversal yet. V2 must not pass immediately on descent start.
PR5-FIX-2 guard: cycle window spans >4500ms (stale setup/prior-attempt buffer). V2 must reject as attempt_duration_out_of_scope.
PR5-FIX-3 guard: synthetic representation of real-device false positive case 1 (fail01.json). Slow positioning rise, stale closure far from tail. V2 must reject as stale_closure_not_at_tail.
PR5-FIX-3 guard: synthetic representation of real-device false positive case 2 (fail02.json). Same pattern with slightly different frame count. V2 must reject as stale_closure_not_at_tail.
PR5-FIX-3 guard: descentStartFrameIndex=0 (no pre-descent baseline) with stale closure far from tail. V2 must reject as stale_closure_not_at_tail.
PR5-FIX-3 guard: reversalFrameIndex === nearStartReturnFrameIndex (same frame) with stale closure. V2 must reject as stale_closure_not_at_tail.
PR5-FIX-3 guard: explicit tail-freshness test. Complete cycle < 4500ms (cycle cap won't fire) but stableAfterReturn is far from input tail (>400ms). V2 must reject as stale_closure_not_at_tail.
PR5-FIX-3 guard: old positioning motion creates stale closure, then user stands, then starts new descent. Full regression pattern. V2 must reject as stale_closure_not_at_tail.
